CustomField.description: Not currently mapped - CounselingRecord_ClientIntake_CounselingSeeking_Other. If 'Counseling Seeking'=Other, then this value would be required.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Not currently mapped - CounselingRecord_ClientIntake_CounselingSeeking_Other. If 'Counseling Seeking'=Other, then this value would be required.
CustomField.label: CounselingSeekingOther_ClientIntake
